title: Regression Metrics Path
description: Build fluency in Regression Metrics inside Evaluation Metrics by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Masked Autoencoders (MAE)
steps.summary: Masked Autoencoders (MAE) belongs to the Evaluation Metrics area of AI/ML, within Regression Metrics. It sits inside Evaluation Metrics / Regression Metrics. Start after Masked autoencoders and Autoencoders. It opens into MAE (Masked Autoencoders for Vision) and semantic segmentation using MAE (Masked Autoencoders).
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Masked autoencoders
steps.summary: Masked autoencoders belongs to the Evaluation Metrics area of AI/ML, within Regression Metrics. It sits inside Evaluation Metrics / Regression Metrics. Start after Autoencoders. It opens into Masked Autoencoders (MAE) and MAE (Masked Autoencoders for Vision).
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Root Mean Squared Error (RMSE)
steps.summary: Root Mean Squared Error (RMSE) belongs to the Evaluation Metrics area of AI/ML, within Regression Metrics. It sits inside Evaluation Metrics / Regression Metrics. Start after Root Mean Squared Error and RMSE.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: MAE (Masked Autoencoders for Vision)
steps.summary: MAE (Masked Autoencoders for Vision) belongs to the Evaluation Metrics area of AI/ML, within Regression Metrics. It sits inside Evaluation Metrics / Regression Metrics. Start after Masked Autoencoders (MAE) and Masked autoencoders.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: semantic segmentation using MAE (Masked Autoencoders)
steps.summary: semantic segmentation using MAE (Masked Autoencoders) belongs to the Evaluation Metrics area of AI/ML, within Regression Metrics. It sits inside Evaluation Metrics / Regression Metrics. Start after Masked Autoencoders (MAE) and Masked autoencoders.

steps.title: Root Mean Squared Error
steps.summary: Root Mean Squared Error belongs to the Evaluation Metrics area of AI/ML, within Regression Metrics. It sits inside Evaluation Metrics / Regression Metrics. Start after R-Squared and R-squared (R²). It opens into Root Mean Squared Error (RMSE).
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Mean Absolute Error
steps.summary: Mean Absolute Error belongs to the Evaluation Metrics area of AI/ML, within Regression Metrics. It sits inside Evaluation Metrics / Regression Metrics. Compare it with Mean Absolute Error (MAE) and Root Mean Squared Error. It opens into Mean Absolute Error (MAE) and Mean Absolute Percentage Error (MAPE).
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Mean Absolute Error (MAE)
steps.summary: Mean Absolute Error (MAE) belongs to the Evaluation Metrics area of AI/ML, within Regression Metrics. It sits inside Evaluation Metrics / Regression Metrics. Start after Mean Absolute Error.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
